summary: Delete A Manual Forecast Line Item
description: Delete a manual forecast line item for a budget line item

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the manual forecast line item.

204.description: The manual forecast line item has been deleted

budget_line_item_id.description: Identifier of the parent budget line item. NOTE - budget line item id or wbs code id is required

wbs_code_id.description: Wbs code id of the parent budget line item. NOTE - budget line item id or wbs code id is required
